translation.homeSubtitle: Smart and private synchronization of Hebrew events to your Google Calendar.
translation.appInstalled: HebSync is installed on this device.
translation.selectAccess: Choose how HebSync should work with your calendars.
translation.maxPrivacyDesc: Use only calendars created by HebSync. A simple way to keep everything separate.
translation.readOnlyDesc: Connect HebSync to your existing calendars too. We'll start with view access and ask for editing only when needed.
translation.fullAccessDesc: HebSync can create, update, and delete events in your selected calendars.
translation.orSelectOther: Need a different setup? You can reconnect with another option.
translation.thanksTo: Thanks to the open source community and the Hebcal library for the computational engine
translation.addEventSubtitle: Enter a single event or upload a bulk file
translation.checkUpcomingDates: Check the upcoming dates for this event
translation.reloginForEdit: We'll ask for editing permission when you choose to make changes.
translation.permissionScreenSubtitle: Choose how HebSync should work with your calendars.
translation.permissionModalBody: Choose how you want HebSync to work with your calendars. You can change this later.
translation.permissionReconnectBody: Your Google connection expired. Choose how HebSync should reconnect and continue working with your calendars.
translation.permissionUpgradeBody: You're about to create, update, or delete events. HebSync needs permission to make changes in your calendar on your behalf.
translation.permissionUpgradeCardTitle: Turn on editing for all calendars
translation.permissionUpgradeCardBody: We'll keep your current setup and ask Google for the extra permission needed to create, edit, or delete events in calendars you choose to manage.
translation.permissionUpgradeTrust: We only ask for this when you choose an action that changes your calendar.
translation.permissionHebsyncOnlyDesc: Use only calendars created by HebSync. A simple way to keep everything separate.
translation.permissionHebsyncOnlyFooter: Best if you want HebSync activity separate from your personal and work calendars.
translation.permissionAllCalendarsDesc: Use HebSync with your existing calendars too, so you can manage events in one place.
translation.permissionAllCalendarsHelper: View access first. Editing permission only when needed.
translation.permissionAllCalendarsFooter: You'll first allow HebSync to view your calendars. If you later create, edit, or delete events, we'll ask for permission before making changes.
translation.permissionInfoBody: HebSync can either work in its own dedicated calendars or connect to your existing ones. If you choose existing calendars, we first ask to view them so you can choose what HebSync should use.
translation.permissionInfoTrustBody: Editing permission is requested only when you choose an action like creating, updating, or deleting an event.
translation.editingEnabledStatus: Editing enabled for your selected calendars.
translation.viewingOnlyStatus: Viewing calendars now. We'll ask before HebSync makes changes.
translation.hebSyncOnlyStatus: HebSync only works with calendars it created.
translation.switchToHebsyncOnlyConfirm: To switch back to HebSync calendars only, we'll disconnect and reconnect your Google account with the safer access level. Continue?
translation.errorNoCalendar: Please select at least one calendar to sync
translation.leapYearNote: Leap year - moved to Adar II
